message:
fix(session): reset modified flag before save to prevent perpetual re-save

MemoryStore::save was persisting the modified=true flag, causing
reloaded sessions to appear pre-modified on every subsequent request.
This led to unnecessary Set-Cookie headers and re-saves even when
handlers made no changes.

Also includes audit batch 474 entries for circuit_breaker.rs (SOUND)
and web/session.rs (FIXED).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
